cards.name: The Assassin
cards.text: Purchase only at deck creation. Limit one Identity per investigator. The Assassin enters play Getting Started side up. Your deckbuilding is changed to the following: Deck size: Your original deck size -5. Deckbuilding Options: Cards of your printed class level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5, Skills with at least one [combat] icon level 0-2. Deckbuilding Requirements: Your original deckbuilding requirements other than any weapon cards in those requirements, 5 copies of Assassin's Knife, Rival Assassin. Deckbuilding Restrictions: No Weapon cards other than Assassin's Knife. Forced: At the start of the scenario: Flip The Assassin.
cards.back_text:
Uses (0 skill)
While The Assassin has ...
2 or more skill: your attacks with Assassin's knife deal +1 damage.
4 or more skill: copies of Assassin's knife you own gain fast.
[reaction] When you defeat an enemy with a copy of Assassin's Knife: Add one skill to The Assassin (limit once per phase).
[reaction]When an Assassin's Knife you control leaves play, spend one skill: Shuffle it into your deck. (limit once per round)

cards.name: Assassin's Knife
cards.text: Bonded (The Assassin). [action] Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Assassin's Knife: Fight. You get +3 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

cards.name: Rival Assassin
cards.text: Bonded(The Assassin) Concealed 2. Forced At the start of the enemy phase: Remove X skill from Expertise. X is 1 + half the number of concealed mini-cards in play (rounded down. Max 3). For each skill that cannot be removed, this card's bearer takes 1 horror.
